scripts.kill-ports: lsof -ti :8000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :3032 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.dev: npm run kill-ports && concurrently --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" ".venv/bin/uvicorn backend.api.app:app --reload --port 8000" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
